text.message: Oj with wood port is crazy

the world is doom, is all over, we lost, everything is hopeless

i am leading, but the table talk here is cucu
IT ALL OVER; WE ARE DOOM; EVETYHING IS HOPELESS

I would have traded for some back
PLEASE SOMEONE END THIS SUFFERING NOOOOW
Well that was silly to me, I just thought after I stole you wouldn’t want to trade
red, collaborations is only for those that are loosing, when he mono he was already at 5
so collaboration was just a talking point
Breaking my city crushed any help I could have given
but, after all, we should all resign, oj will win, everything is hopeless
Blue can you trade an ore for sheep?
Another one so I can city?

i havent move in the last 3 rolls
i am patiently wating for u to catch me and stop robbing me, please
